title: `skopeo copy` fails with `panic: d.nx != 0` when uploading to Azure ACR
body:
Hi,
I'm running skopeo in a docker container that was built like this:
```
FROM fedora:31
ENV SKOPEO_VERSION 0.1.40
RUN dnf install -y skopeo
```
So I'm using skopeo 1.40.

Here's my command:
```
skopeo --debug copy --src-cert-dir src/tls --dest-creds '****:****' docker://mysrcregistry/mygid/myaid:0.0.1-86.86b711b docker://mytgtregistry.azurecr.io/mygid/myaid:0.0.1-86.86b711b
```

(I changed the image name and the registry name). And here's is the end of the output:
```
...

	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/opencontainers/go-digest/digester.go:38 +0x4b fp=0xc000622b80 sp=0xc000622b40 pc=0x5619746d9ebb

	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/containers/image/v5/docker/docker_image_dest.go:169 +0x6ca fp=0xc000623218 sp=0xc000622b80 pc=0x561974a6929a

	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:1167 +0x468 fp=0xc000623778 sp=0xc000623218 pc=0x56197496ccc8

	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:1030 +0x19a fp=0xc000623990 sp=0xc000623778 pc=0x56197496c0da

	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:975 +0x375 fp=0xc000623d20 sp=0xc000623990 pc=0x56197496b575
github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*imageCopier).copyLayers.func1(0x5, 0xc000630690, 0x47, 0xae0c74, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0xc0002cc580, 0x31, ...)
	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:755 +0x477 fp=0xc000623f78 sp=0xc000623d20 pc=0x5619749706f7
runtime.goexit()
	/usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:1357 +0x1 fp=0xc000623f80 sp=0xc000623f78 pc=0x561974610581
created by github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*imageCopier).copyLayers.func2
	/builddir/build/BUILD/skopeo-be6146b0a8471b02e776134119a2c37dfb70d414/vendor/src/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:766 +0x1ca
```

Before the failure, some layers are uploaded successfully, the I get a 404 (check the debug output), then the panic happens. This is reproducible 100% when uploading to Azure. Something very similar works in a very stable manner when uploading to AWS ECR.

Do you have an idea what could be wrong?

T&R
Marc-Philip

comments.body:
[skopeo_goroutines.txt](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/files/4096246/skopeo_goroutines.txt)

- There were 83 goroutines in total.
- Here is where the panic is called (line 234): https://golang.org/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go
Thanks; this was previously reported (and is tracked) at https://github.com/containers/image/issues/750 ; I’m afraid the cause is currently unknown.
